urdu transliteration text:
Kehti Thi Ye Maa Khoon Bhari Maiyat Say Lipat Kar
Haye Haye Ali Akbar, Haye Haye Ali Akbar.
english translation text:
His Mother kept saying while attached to the body soaked in blood
O My Ali Akbar, O My Ali Akbar.

urdu transliteration text: Arman Tha Pehnawoon Gi Poshak ShahaniAfsoos Ke Raas Aayi Na Tujh Ku Yeh JawaniKaisa Tha Muqaddar, Haye Haye Ali Akbar.
english translation text:
I had a wish to dress you in a grand manner
But sadly your youth was snatched away from you
Alas! What a destiny, O My Ali Akbar

urdu transliteration text: Athara Baras Paal Kay Parwan CharhayaAur Gaisuwoon Wala Hai Mera Khoo(n) Main NahayaKurban Ho Maadar, Haye Haye Ali Akbar.
english translation text:
Eighteen years did I nurture and raised you
Yet my young lad, with handsome locks of hair, is bathed in blood
May your mother be sacrificed for you, O Ali Akbar

urdu transliteration text:
Itna To Zara Thehro Tumhai Dhulha Bana Loon
Bas Ek Jhalak Sehray Ki Sughra Ko Dhika Loon
Baichain Thi Khwahar, Haye Haye Ali Akbar.
english translation text:
Please wait for sometime so that I can see you as a groom
Allow me to show Sughra a glimpse of you.
Your sister is worried, O My Ali Akbar

urdu transliteration text:
Maa Teri Judayi Mein Bhala Kaisay Jeeye Gi
Mar Jaayegi Sughra Jo Khabar Teri Sunay Gi
Ab Kya Karoon Dilber, Haye Haye Ali Akbar.
english translation text:
How will your mum survive when you are gone
Sughra will die when she hears this news
What I should do my sweet heart, O My Ali Akbar

urdu transliteration text:
Tehro Kay Mein Atharween Mannat To Badha Loon
Phir Lay Kay Balayein Tujhay Jeenay Ki Dua Doon
Sadqay Ho Ay Maadar, Haye Haye Ali Akbar
Wait till I fulfill my eighteenth promise
english translation text:
I shall take all your tribulations and pray for your life
May your mom be sacrificed for you, O My Ali Akbar

urdu transliteration text:
Pehlay To Ek Aawaz Pay Uth Jatay Thay Beta
Ab Etni Saada’oon Pay Bhi Pehloo Nahi Badla
Kya Ho Gaya Dilber, Haye Haye Ali Akbar.
english translation text:
Earlier, you would wake up as soon as you would hear me
Whereas now, despite calling you numerous times, you are not responding
What happened to you O My sweet heart, O My Ali Akbar

urdu transliteration text:
Tum Hichkiyaan Lay Lay Kay Jo Dam Taur Rahay Ho
Moo Maa Say Hamaisha Kay Liye Mour Rahay Ho
Kyon Rootay Ho Dilber, Haye Haye Ali Akbar
english translation text:
Whilst you breathe your last breath and hiccup (from thirst) at the same time,
You are departing from your mother forever,
Why do you cry O my sweet heart, Haye Haye Ali Akbar

urdu transliteration text:
Aaye Jo Hamein Lootnay Khaimay Mein Sitamgar
Maa Day Gi Sadaayein Ali Akbar, Ali Akbar
Chin Jaayay Gi Chaadar, Haye Haye Ali Akbar.
english translation text:
When the enemies come to take our belongings from the tent
Your mother will call out saying O My Ali Akbar, O My Ali Akbar
My veils will be snatched away, O My Ali Akbar

urdu transliteration text:
Jab Koi Jawan Laash Nazar Aati Hai Mahshar
Ek Yaad Suway Karbobala Jaati Hai Mahshar
Dil Rota Hay Keh Kar, Haye Haye Ali Akbar
Whenever I see any young person’s dead body
My thoughts reach out to Karbala
english translation text: My heart cries for you,O My Ali Akbar

urdu transliteration text:
kehti Thi Ye Maa Khoon Bhari Maiyat Say Lipat Kar
Haye Haye Ali Akbar, Haye Haye Ali Akbar.
english translation text:
His Mother kept saying while attached to the body soaked in blood
O My Ali Akbar, O My Ali Akbar.
